meaning: n.(白天)小睡,打盹,细毛,孤注一掷;vi.小睡,疏忽;vt.使拉毛,修整,预测...为获胜马;Nationa Attachment Point,国家附属站点
examples: An elderly person may nap during the day and then sleep only five hours a night.
Don't take a nap in the afternoon.
Taking a nap is one of my favorites.
People aren't shy about kicking off their shoes and tucking into display beds for a nap.
After the final whistle of Super Bowl, everyone is treated to an approximately 15-minute nap.
